frontmatter.title: Denotational world-indexed logical relations and friends
frontmatter.meta: @phdthesis{thamsborg:2010, author = {Thamsborg, {Jacob Junker}}, address = {Denmark}, school = {IT-Universitetet i K{\o{}}benhavn}, year = {2010}, title = {Denotational World-indexed Logical Relations and Friends}, }
